models.label: MedGemma 4B
models.note: Google's medical VLM (Gemma 3); radiology, pathology, dermatology, ophthalmology

models.label: OpenBioLLM 8B
models.note: Biomedical fine-tune of Llama 3; beats larger models on biomed benchmarks

models.label: BioMistral 7B
models.note: Mistral fine-tuned on PubMed Central; strong for entity extraction / triage

models.label: Meditron 7B
models.note: EPFL/Yale clinical model trained on PubMed + guidelines

models.label: Pixtral 12B
models.note: Mistral AI (France), Apache-2.0; top open general VLM — OCR, charts, visual Q&A

models.label: Llama 3.2 Vision 11B
models.note: Meta general VLM baseline — contrast with medical pretraining

models.label: Gemma 3 4B
models.note: Google Gemma 3; native Ollama vision — reliable fast fallback

models.label: Moondream
models.note: Tiny/instant vision model; safe live-demo fallback
